title: Backpacks & More
description: Backpacks Datapack (1.17+) adds visible, working, customizable backpacks with 27-slot storage—no mods needed.
body:
![Working Backpacks Datapack [since 2020]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23118b7583eebbd7798e9184a8fefc5b69bac198.png)

Experience **aesthetically pleasing backpacks** in Minecraft **without any mods**, fully multiplayer-friendly and visible on your player model when held! 

![Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28f4efd9a9cb11ede447fd03f60fd609fd6cd0ee.png)
![Some variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96eda816d631b18de27c4dd8cfde4df333d21fc1.png)

## Features  
- **Fully Functional Backpacks:** Store up to **27 items**.  
- **Simple Crafting Recipe:** Easy to craft and use.  
- **Classic & Colored Versions:** Match your style with the original or colored backpacks.  
- **Mod-Free & Multiplayer Ready:** Works seamlessly in both singleplayer and servers.  

## How to Install  
1. **Download the Datapack** (and resources)  
2. **Add the Resource Pack** (for servers, rename it `resources.zip` and place it in your world folder)  
3. **Enjoy your backpacks!**  

For more details, check the **[official WIKI](https://sites.google.com/view/ultroghasthub/datapacks/backpacks)** or ask questions in the comments of the **PMC page**.  

✨ I created this datapack **for free, for you**! Your feedback is always welcome—suggestions, bug fixes, or any ideas to make it better.  

💎 If you like it, consider showing your support with a **like** or **donation**.
